data.description:
1action
Time:
Range: feet 60
Components: V.S
Duration:
a strong Vouattempt suppress emotions in group

A bolt of lightning leaps from your hand to a single target within range. That target must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d8 thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The bolt then skips up to three other targets in range: creatures must make the same saving throw, taking the same amount of damage on a failed save and half as much damage on a successful one.
An instantaneous spell comes to completion in its entirety, very quickly, the effect of which lasts for whatever duration the spell specifies.

Casting a single bolt of lightning toward a target that can be within three range. Each bolt then leaps to up to three other targets, each of which must be within 30 feet of the first. A target can be a creature or an object, but only one target of bolts is targeted by this spell. The spell ends on a successful save; otherwise, it deals lightning damage.

1action
Time:
Range: feet
Components: V,S
Duration: 1hour
An instantaneous spell harms, heals, creates, or alters a location, object, or creature for a moment. Then—boom—it's over.

You touch a willing creature and lightly lace the target's body with magical energy, granting the target a +2 bonus to AC until the spell ends.
